title: Incorrect Trie Node Creation Due to Missing Child Node Check

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Your task is to fix the buggy TrieNode creation in the provided function. The function should return true if a prefix is in the Trie, false otherwise.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be a boolean indicating whether the prefix is in the Trie.

examples.input:
Example input (matching the stdin format that main wrapper expects)
3
app
apply
apple

starterCode.javascript:
function TrieNode() {
    this.children = [
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null,
        null
    ];
}

testCases.input: First line count, second line elements (stdin match)
